channel.title: Deepu Soman — Engineering Notes
channel.description: Practical, in-depth engineering articles on AI agents, cloud architecture, platform engineering and modern software delivery.

item.title: Signal: Ransomware moved to triple extortion — and the numbers aren't slowing
item.description: Data-leak listings up 213% YoY; the practitioner's take and one action to run this week.

item.title: Signal: The EU AI Act's full enforcement lands 2 August 2026
item.description: High-risk obligations activate while 82% of enterprises run shadow AI — inventory before you police.

item.title: The Certification Stack: What 17 Certifications Taught Me About Technology Leadership
item.description: From MCSA and CCNP to PMP, the ISACA trio and TOGAF — a personal map of two decades of certifications and what each layer actually taught.

item.title: PMP, PRINCE2 or Agile: Choosing Your Project Management Path
item.description: PMP, PRINCE2, PMI-ACP and CSM compared by someone who holds all four — with the decision tree the training providers won't lead with.

item.title: CISA, CISM, CRISC: Mapping the ISACA Triangle
item.description: Auditor, manager and risk lenses on one system — which ISACA certification to sit first and how the trio combines.

item.title: CEH & CHFI: Learning the Attacker's Mindset — Legally
item.description: What the EC-Council pair actually teaches, where they fit against hands-on certs, and why the forensic mindset is the underrated half.

item.title: Does TOGAF Still Matter? Enterprise Architecture in the AI Era
item.description: An honest defence and critique of TOGAF — and why AI transformation makes architecture governance more relevant, not less.

item.title: ITIL in a DevOps World: Service Management That Doesn't Slow You Down
item.description: ITIL and DevOps solve the same problem at different altitudes — what to keep, what to retire, and change control without the CAB.

item.title: Passkeys: Life After Passwords
item.description: Phishing-resistant sign-in is finally mainstream. How passkeys work under the hood, plus a pragmatic rollout plan for your product.
